updrs_part_iii.Description: Motor Disorders Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale, part III (motor examination)

updrs_total.Description: Motor Disorders Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale, total score

moca.Description: Montreal Cognitive Assessment score, a measure of cognitive function

age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

disease_duration.Description: Time passed since the participant was diagnosed with Parkinson's disease

ledd.Description: Levodopa Equivalent Daily Dose, a standardized measure of the total daily dose of anti-parkinsonian medications

pigd_score.Description: Postural Instability and Gait Difficulty score, calculated from specific items in the MDS-UPDRS

td_score.Description: Tremor Dominant score, calculated from specific items in the MDS-UPDRS

ctt.Description: Color Trails Test time duration, a measure of executive function and processing speed.
